if i signal something like i do this or that... it doesn't mean you MUST do that... especially not if you don't understand..

comment.body:
So basically Alma said that If vol crush happens it would have happened at 5565 (exactly what did, vol is crushing)👸🏼. This would be supportive for the market of course but not enough to see squeeze up, we need upside vol up. In addition is positive speed env so as we move up on spot gamma increases and I guess this is the reason why we need vol up to squeeze ( where there is not vol, there is gamma, and it is suppressive in positive speed to the upside) 
I interprets it like that (correct me if I’m wrong )
